{"rule":"MORFOLOGIK_RULE_EN_US","sentence":"^\\QFor N=3, \"CRAZY\" becomes \"  C\", \" CR\", \"CRA\", \"RAZ\", \"AZY\", \"ZY \", \"Y  \".\\E$"}
{"rule":"WHITESPACE_RULE","sentence":"^\\QFor N=3, \"CRAZY\" becomes \"  C\", \" CR\", \"CRA\", \"RAZ\", \"AZY\", \"ZY \", \"Y  \".\\E$"}
